posts.caption:
Struggling to hit your protein? Here are 3 easy wins 💪

#NourishAI #MacroTracking #ProteinGoals #FitnessNutrition #MealPrep

data.TIP1_TEXT: Start with 30g protein at breakfast. Eggs + Greek yogurt is the easiest combo.
data.TIP2_TEXT: Add a protein shake between meals. That's an easy 25-30g without cooking.
data.TIP3_TEXT: Double your dinner protein. 8oz chicken instead of 4oz = 25g extra.

posts.caption:
Stop believing these calorie myths ❌

Track smarter, not harder.

#NourishAI #CalorieTracking #NutritionFacts #FitnessTips

data.TIP1_TEXT: "Eating less = faster results." Too big a deficit kills muscle and tanks metabolism.
data.TIP2_TEXT: "All calories are equal." 200 cal of chicken hits different than 200 cal of candy.
data.TIP3_TEXT: "You can eyeball portions." Most people are off by 40-60%. Track it.

#MealPrep #MacroFriendly #NourishAI #ProteinMeals

data.TIP1_TEXT: Plan before you shop. Set your weekly macro targets in NourishAI first.
data.TIP2_TEXT: Weigh everything once. Prep 5 identical containers = zero daily decisions.

posts.caption:
Bulking vs Cutting — the numbers that actually matter 📊

#BulkingTips #CuttingTips #NourishAI #Macros #Bodybuilding

data.TIP1_TEXT: Bulking? Aim for +15% surplus. More than that = unnecessary fat gain.
data.TIP2_TEXT: Cutting? Stay at -20% deficit. Slower cuts preserve more muscle.
data.TIP3_TEXT: Either way: Hit 1g protein per lb bodyweight. Non-negotiable.

posts.caption:
Water intake is the most underrated performance hack 💧

#Hydration #FitnessHacks #NourishAI #WaterIntake

data.TIP1_TEXT: Dehydration = weaker lifts. Even 2% dehydrated drops strength by 20%.
data.TIP2_TEXT: Protein needs water. High protein diets need 100+ oz/day for kidney health.
data.TIP3_TEXT: Track it. NourishAI's water tracker makes it dead simple to stay on top.
